testcase.name: @stynx/logging barrel > exports at least one symbol
LoggingDedupeService > suppresses duplicate errors inside the same window
LoggingDedupeService > reports the suppressed duplicate count when the window rolls over
StynxLogger > attaches trace and suppressed duplicate count to error logs
StynxLogger.log/warn/debug/verbose > log emits at info level with the passed message
StynxLogger.log/warn/debug/verbose > warn emits at warn level
StynxLogger.log/warn/debug/verbose > debug emits at debug level
StynxLogger.log/warn/debug/verbose > verbose emits at trace level
StynxLogger.error edge cases > suppresses error log when dedupe says so
StynxLogger.error edge cases > passes only fields when called with object context (no trace string)
StynxLoggingModule > wires default options and applies the request middleware
createPinoLogger > redacts sensitive values
createPinoLogger > refuses an empty redact list in production
createPinoLogger > deduplicates and filters redact paths while honoring explicit level
createPinoLogger > uses default redact paths and LOG_LEVEL defaults
createPinoLogger > uses stdout destination defaults in production when no destination is injected
createPinoLogger > uses the development pretty transport when no destination is injected outside production
RequestLogFieldFactory > returns only extra fields when no request context is active
RequestLogFieldFactory > projects active request context fields
RequestLogFieldFactory > omits optional request context fields when they are unset
RequestLoggingMiddleware > logs one request completion record for non-health routes
RequestLoggingMiddleware > skips health endpoints
RequestLoggingMiddleware > uses default request values and custom skip paths
